title: EF Scale Announcer Protomanly's Weather
description: This project adds EF announcer of tornadoes.
body:
# **_ALPHA 1.0.4 IS HERE!_**

Hey there, this is my first addition to a mod I made, thank you so much for downloading it, or at least just being curious in the page reading this...

**THIS IS AN ADDITION!**

This mod adds a feature, that detects tornadoes touchingdown, when it detects it, it calculates, and says what EF-level is it. (Windspeed included)

It calculates the EF-Scale by windspeed, not destruction!

Thank you for reading,

Hope you have a great time playing with this mod!

Preview: 🌪 Tornado touchdown: EF5 (200 mph)

Added:
* **Fixed bugs.**
* **Added config (works pretty good)**

Added config (works pretty good)
Thank you for playing the mod, I really appreciate it !

**! Warning here !**

You need protomanly's weather mod, or nothing will work!



1.0.4 alpha out :D
